scripts.security:agent-review: codex exec review --uncommitted 'Use $security-commit-review to review the current local changes for security vulnerabilities only. Prioritize exploitable findings with exact file references and minimal fixes.'
scripts.audit:mobile: sh -c 'BASE=${MOBILE_AUDIT_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:5173}; mkdir -p output/playwright/mobile-audit && MOBILE_AUDIT_BASE_URL=$BASE ~/.codex/skills/playwright/scripts/playwright_cli.sh open "$BASE" --headed && MOBILE_AUDIT_BASE_URL=$BASE ~/.codex/skills/playwright/scripts/playwright_cli.sh run-code --filename scripts/mobile-playwright-audit.js'
